name: integrate
description: Apply validated recommendations from beta mining into the judgment model

name: mine
description: Mine patterns from user behavior — prompts, decisions, skill chains, evolution cycles

name: architecture
description: Architecture integrity — do the layers connect? agent system, cross-layer seams, documentation health

name: environment
description: Environment readiness and tooling quality — fast go/no-go or deep audit

name: patterns
description: Cross-run intelligence and automation proposals — diagnose recurring patterns or propose prevention

name: references
description: Cross-file reference integrity — broken links, orphans, stale SPEC_GRAPH edges

name: requirements
description: Specification consistency, coverage, and drift — static audit, change-driven propagation check, or pending-drift review

name: system
description: System inventory — enumerate every active WarpOS system, diff against manifest, report drift and gaps

name: both
description: Commit locally then push to remote — full commit + push flow

name: local
description: Stage and commit changes locally — smart message, no push

name: remote
description: Push current branch to remote — with safety checks

name: list
description: Browse all saved favorite moments, grouped by category

name: search
description: Search favorite moments by keyword

name: deep
description: Deep fix — Full diagnostic with automatic framework selection, 5 solutions, root cause analysis, and prevention

name: fast
description: Quick fix — Direct Investigation, no formal framework. Read error, find cause, fix it, verify.

name: add
description: Design and create a new hook from a description

name: disable
description: Temporarily disable a hook

name: friction
description: Analyze friction points — find patterns that suggest missing hooks

name: sync
description: Copy hooks to WarpOS repo

name: test
description: Test all hooks with synthetic payloads and measure execution time

name: combined
description: Combined learning — runs learn:conversation + learn:events in parallel, then deduplicates and reports

name: conversation
description: Conversation learning — extract learnings from conversation, then review and maintain learning quality

name: events
description: Mine the event log for learnings — patterns, anomalies, and insights from tool/prompt/spec/audit events

name: ingest
description: Ingest external knowledge from files, links, or YouTube videos and apply learnings to the system

name: all
description: Registry of all maps — shows every map, its source, last updated, and staleness

name: architecture
description: App structure — routes, components, libs, how they connect

name: enforcements
description: Enforcement coverage — hooks, gates, gap analysis, open/closed gaps

name: hooks
description: Hook wiring diagram — events, matchers, scripts, execution order

name: memory
description: Memory store relationships — who reads/writes each store, entry counts

name: skills
description: Skill dependency graph — namespaces, cross-references, data flow

name: systems
description: Systems manifest graph — dependencies, status, categories

name: tools
description: Tool registry — skills, hooks, external CLIs, API services, npm scripts, platform tools

name: adhoc
description: Enter adhoc team mode — Alpha + Beta + Gamma for collaborative feature development

name: oneshot
description: Initiate a oneshot build — launch Delta as standalone orchestrator for full skeleton runs

name: solo
description: Enter solo mode — just Alpha and the user, no agent team

name: improve
description: Update preflight passes based on gaps discovered during runs

name: run
description: Pre-run workflow — 7 verification passes + branch creation with skeleton stubs

name: audit
description: Active full-codebase QA audit — systematically walks all 7 failure-mode personas

name: check
description: Passive QA scan on recent git diff changes — checks for 7 failure-mode signatures

name: log
description: Log a reasoning episode — record what framework was used, why, and what happened

name: run
description: Reason through a problem or decision — auto-detects quick triage vs deep deliberation

name: score
description: Score fix quality (0-4) and retroactively reclassify old fixes when new evidence appears

name: full
description: Full red team audit — 11 personas across deterministic scanning + LLM reasoning. Finds auth bypasses, prompt injection, business logic abuse, attack chains.

name: scan
description: Quick red team scan — deterministic tools only (deps, routes, CVEs, secrets, config). Fast, no LLM reasoning.

name: deep
description: Real deep research — Gemini Thinking writes the brief, then OpenAI Deep Research API + Gemini Deep Research API + Claude multi-round search run in parallel

name: simple
description: Deep research pipeline — queries Claude, ChatGPT (Codex), and Gemini in parallel, saves reports, synthesizes, and applies learnings

name: code
description: Scan git diff for code-level retro signals — bug fixes, new patterns, hygiene rules

name: context
description: Scan conversation context for retro signals — bug reports, decisions, deferred items, UX feedback

name: full
description: Full retro — context + git log + code diffs + cross-run analysis, all 9 categories

name: checkpoint
description: Force an immediate session checkpoint save

name: handoff
description: Generate a rich AI-analyzed handoff document (replaces /handoff)

name: history
description: Browse recent session summaries from handoffs/ directory

name: read
description: Read the cross-session inbox — see what other Alex sessions have been doing

name: resume
description: Load and display the last handoff or checkpoint — use after /clear or cold start

name: write
description: Post a message to the cross-session inbox so other Alex sessions can see it

name: cleanup
description: Audit all skills for dead weight, duplicates, broken references, and namespace issues — then clean up

name: create
description: Create a new skill from a description — supports simple, multi-phase, and parallel workflows

name: delete
description: Remove a skill (with backup)

name: edit
description: Edit an existing skill

name: deep
description: Full sleep cycle — all 6 phases: NREM consolidation, cleanup, replay, REM dreaming, repair, growth (~15-30 min)

name: quick
description: Light nap — NREM consolidation + glymphatic cleanup only (~5 min)

name: review
description: Design system compliance audit — read-only check of components against the projects design-system docs

name: check
description: Compare your WarpOS installation against the latest version — find stale, new, and missing items

name: health
description: Verify WarpOS installation — checks every system, reports green/yellow/red with plain-English fixes

name: init
description: Set up WarpOS in your project — clone the repo, run the installer, get started

name: sync
description: Update WarpOS from the latest version on GitHub

name: tour
description: Guided introduction to WarpOS — explains everything in simple language, no jargon
